category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Kenyan market via the KEBS PVoC programme.

title.en: China-to-Kenya LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入肯亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Kenyan requirements: KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and the Standardization Mark / Import Standardization Mark on KS IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 basis, EPRA / KEBS energy efficiency labelling, and Communications Authority approval for wireless lighting, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与肯尼亚要求差距对照：KEBS 出口前符合性验证（PVoC）及基于 KS IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的标准化标志/进口标准化标志、EPRA / KEBS 能效标签、以及无线照明的通信管理局（CA）核准，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與肯亞要求差距對照：KEBS 出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）及基於 KS IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的標準化標誌/進口標準化標誌、EPRA / KEBS 能效標籤、以及無線照明的通信管理局（CA）核准，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Kenyan law, KS standards, KEBS PVoC routes, EPRA energy efficiency requirements, and applicable conformity-assessment obligations with qualified professionals and a recognised PVoC partner before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及认可的 PVoC 合作机构核验现行肯尼亚法律、KS 标准、KEBS PVoC 路径、EPRA 能效要求及适用的合格评定义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及認可的 PVoC 合作機構核驗現行肯亞法律、KS 標準、KEBS PVoC 路徑、EPRA 能效要求及適用的合格評定義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Kenya must route the consignment through the KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme to obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) before shipment; comply with the relevant Kenya Standards, which adopt the IEC series (KS IEC 60598 for luminaire safety, KS IEC 62560 / 62471 for lamps and photobiological safety, KS CISPR 15 for EMC emissions); affix the KEBS Standardization Mark / Import Standardization Mark; meet EPRA / KEBS energy efficiency and labelling requirements where the product falls within the regulated lighting category; obtain Communications Authority (CA) type approval for any wireless smart-lighting functionality; and operate through an in-country importer for clearance at the Port of Mombasa. Kenya does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS, REACH-SVHC, or energy-labelling regime identical to the EU — substance restriction and energy-efficiency obligations are enforced through KS standards and KEBS / EPRA instruments, not a single horizontal directive — so existing CCC certification and CN GB test reports do not by themselves satisfy the Kenyan PVoC route.
answer_first.zh: 向肯尼亚出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：在出货前通过 KEBS 出口前符合性验证（PVoC）程序取得符合性证书（CoC）；符合相关肯尼亚标准（采用 IEC 系列：KS IEC 60598 灯具安全、KS IEC 62560 / 62471 灯及光生物安全、KS CISPR 15 EMC 发射）；加贴 KEBS 标准化标志/进口标准化标志；在产品属于受管制照明类别时满足 EPRA / KEBS 能效及标签要求；对任何无线智能照明功能取得通信管理局（CA）型号核准；并通过本地进口商在蒙巴萨港完成清关。肯尼亚不实行与欧盟完全相同的横向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或能效标签制度——物质限制和能效义务通过 KS 标准及 KEBS / EPRA 工具执行，而非单一横向指令——因此现有 CCC 认证和中国 GB 检测报告本身不足以满足肯尼亚 PVoC 路径。
answer_first.zht: 向肯亞出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：在出貨前通過 KEBS 出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）程序取得符合性證書（CoC）；符合相關肯亞標準（採用 IEC 系列：KS IEC 60598 燈具安全、KS IEC 62560 / 62471 燈及光生物安全、KS CISPR 15 EMC 發射）；加貼 KEBS 標準化標誌/進口標準化標誌；在產品屬於受管制照明類別時滿足 EPRA / KEBS 能效及標籤要求；對任何無線智能照明功能取得通信管理局（CA）型號核准；並通過本地進口商在蒙巴薩港完成清關。肯亞不實行與歐盟完全相同的橫向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或能效標籤制度——物質限制和能效義務通過 KS 標準及 KEBS / EPRA 工具執行，而非單一橫向指令——因此現有 CCC 認證和中國 GB 檢測報告本身不足以滿足肯亞 PVoC 路徑。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on any change to KEBS PVoC routes, the KS standards catalogue, or EPRA energy efficiency regulations
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. KEBS PVoC route designations, KS standard adoptions of IEC editions, and EPRA energy-efficiency thresholds must be re-verified against current KEBS and EPRA sources on each review cycle.
